DISCOVERY 301, DEFENDANT EMBARCADERO FITNESS, INC. DBA FITNESS SF, JACKOVICS ENTERPRISES, INC NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION AND STAY PROCEEDINGS IS GRANTED. THIS CASE IS STAYED IN ITS ENTIRETY PENDING THE CONCLUSION OF ARBITRATION PROCEEDINGS REGARDING THE CLAIMS OF PLAINTIFF KEONI FERNANDEZ-CALUB. *SEE WORD MINUTES FOR COMPLETE RULING* COUNSEL FOR THE PREVAILING PARTY IS REQUIRED TO PREPARE A PROPOSED ORDER WHICH REPEATS VERBATIM THE SUBSTANTIVE PORTION OF THE COURT'S RULING IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312. JUDGE: HAROLD E. KAHN; CLERK: W. TRUPEK; NOT REPORTED (301/HEK)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Arbitration And Stay Proceedings
Off Calendar Feb-24-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT EMBARCADERO FITNESS, INC. DBA FITNESS SF, JACKOVICS ENTERPRISES, INC Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Arbitration And Stay Proceedings

Defendants Embarcadero Fitness and Jackovics Enterprises' motion to compel arbitration and stay proceedings is granted. This case is stayed in its entirety pending the conclusion of arbitration proceedings regarding the claims of plaintiff Keoni Fernandez-Calub.

*SEE WORD MINUTES FOR COMPLETE RULING*

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling in compliance with CRC 3.1312.

Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (301/HEK)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Arbitration And Stay Proceedings
Off Calendar Feb-14-2025 Continued To Feb-24-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 301
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: DEFENDANTS EMBARCADERO FITNESS, INC. DBA FITNESS SF, AND JACKOVICS ENTERPRISES, INC's Motion To Compel Arbitration And Stay Proceedings.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling:

The matter is continued to February 24, 2025, at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 301, for the opposing party to provide courtesy copies of papers per SF Local Rule 2.7B. Failure to comply with this written order may result in sanctions.

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (301/CVA)
